description_long: This is a medium-sized, round pumpkin with a slightly flattened base and a prominent, curved stem at the top. The surface is matte and textured with natural grooves and ridges typical of a pumpkin, and the coloration is a muted orange-brown. The front features a traditional jack-o'-lantern carving with two triangular eyes, a triangular nose, and a wide, jagged mouth, all cut through to reveal the hollow interior. One side of the pumpkin displays a circular hole, likely an access point for placing a light or candle inside. The back and opposite side are uncarved, showing only the natural pumpkin surface. The overall appearance suggests it is intended as a festive Halloween decoration, suitable for placement in urban outdoor or entryway settings.
description: A medium, orange-brown pumpkin with a curved stem and a classic jack-o'-lantern face carved into the front, featuring triangular eyes, nose, and a jagged mouth.
description_view_0: The rear view shows the uncarved, natural pumpkin surface with visible grooves and a slightly flattened base.
description_view_1: The front view displays the jack-o'-lantern face with triangular eyes, nose, and a wide, jagged mouth cut out.
description_view_2: The opposite rear view shows the uncarved pumpkin surface and the stem, with no visible carvings.
description_view_3: This side view reveals a circular hole cut into the pumpkin, likely for candle or light placement.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern face with two triangular eyes, a triangular nose, and a wide, jagged mouth. The style is classic and festive, with clean cutouts and a circular hole on one side for lighting.
